arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta issues update on Thomas Partey's future with midfielder having just seven months remaining on his contract
arts.sum: One of the most experienced players in the Arsenal squad, Partey has produced some hugely impressive performances so far this season.

arts.ttl: West Ham summer signing shares what he doesn't like about London
arts.sum: West Ham United summer signing Carlos Soler has admitted that he doesn’t like how fast the sun goes down in England. The Spain international joined... The post West Ham summer signing shares what he doesn't like about London appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Arsenal title hopes: Are Manchester City or Liverpool the Gunners' biggest threat?
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts assesses whether faltering Manchester City or leaders Liverpool are still the Gunners' biggest threat to winning the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Gabriel injury, Pep Guardiola and Thomas Partey contract
arts.sum: If we keep winning games, maintaining the consistency in terms of performances that’s going to give us a better chance of winning. Obviously it’s a team that are now on a high after their big win against Newcastle away.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told to sign 'absolute superstar' to help win Premier League title
arts.sum: Arsenal have been told they "need" to sign Rodrygo from Real Madrid in the January transfer window to help them win the Premier League title . Speaking to PrimeCasino, Petit said: "Arsenal need to sign Rodrygo from Real Madrid as he’s so underrated and gets overshadowed by Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Jr.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in 'advanced talks' to make most important signing of January transfer window
arts.sum: Roberto Olabe will be leaving his role at Real Sociedad in the summer and a deal could be done very soon to see him arrive at the Emirates Stadium as Edu's replacement. Arsenal may not be hugely busy in the January transfer window .

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal's January & summer transfer plans revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal transfer plans for January and summer 2025 have been revealed.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How Arsenal now feel about signing Viktor Gyokeres after he failed to score against them in midweek
arts.sum: The big Swede failed his audition in midweek...

arts.ttl: Arteta provides vague Gabriel injury update ahead of Premier League clash against West Ham
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta provides an update on Gabriel Magalhaes' fitness ahead of Arsenal's crucial Premier League encounter with West Ham United this weekend.
